_comment: Phase 4.2 — MAX_ATTEMPTS calibration held-out 20% partition. Must be committed and sealed BEFORE any calibration analysis is run. The negative falsifier (Popper AP-5) requires that the calibrated MAX_ATTEMPTS outperform MAX_ATTEMPTS_BASELINE=3 on this held-out set, otherwise the calibration is rejected. Sealed via packages/benchmark/calibration/calibration-seams.ts::verifyHeldoutPartitionSeal. See docs/PHASE_4_PLAN.md §4.2 negative-falsifier procedure.

_fields.rng_seed: integer — frozen RNG seed for the 80/20 partition
_fields.partition_hash: string — sha256 hex over sorted-newline-joined run_ids in the held-out set
_fields.partition_size: integer — count of run_ids in the held-out set
